title: 皐月賞の後に・師に捧げる栄冠

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki has won the Satsuki Sho! Showered
in praise from the audience and feeling their
support, she beams with joy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's race has shown Yaeno Muteki just how
much she's improved. She's now certain that she's
on the right path.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But there are still more races to go in the Classic
Triple Crown tour. Next up is the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I call Yaeno Muteki's family to let them know
about her victory. When she hears how incredibly
moved her family is, her determination burns even
brighter!
